summary: Muno Auth0 SPA integration, container image, GKE manifests, and GKE deployment are live. The round is paused at the intended DNS handoff: Kadyapam needs to add the Cloudflare A record for muno.mestumre.dev, then the GKE managed certificate can finish provisioning and the live Auth0 browser smoke can run.

dns_instructions_for_kadyapam.name: muno
recommended_sequence: Create the Cloudflare DNS record for muno.mestumre.dev pointing at 35.190.7.25.
For first issuance of the GKE ManagedCertificate, use DNS-only if certificate provisioning stalls behind the Cloudflare proxy.
Wait until `kubectl -n muno get managedcertificate muno` reports `Active`.
Enable the Cloudflare orange-cloud proxy and keep SSL/TLS mode Full (Strict).
Tell Codex `DNS added` to resume phase 8 live smoke.

phase_1_checks.auth0_secret_shape: JSON payload with .data.domain, .data.client_id, .data.audience; client_secret ignored by Muno

muno: Optional Auth0 SPA provider with guest-mode fallback.
Bearer token injection for NoETL API requests when signed in.
Auth0 user sub forwarded as user_uid in playbook workloads.
Build-time Vite args for Auth0, Google Maps, and NoETL API base URL.
Container build script reads auth0_client and google-maps-widget-key without logging values.
Docs added for Auth0 setup and muno.mestumre.dev deployment.
ops: Namespace, Deployment, ClusterIP Service with NEG, GKE ManagedCertificate, and GKE Ingress for muno.mestumre.dev.
Deployment references the cluster-local ghcr-pull imagePullSecret because the GHCR package is private.
Pinned amd64 image tag so GKE Autopilot nodes do not hit Mac-built arm64 images.

container: podman image inspect confirmed architecture=amd64, os=linux, size=51858093
gke: kubectl -n muno rollout status deployment/muno succeeded
kubectl -n muno get deployment/pods shows 1/1 available on ghcr.io/noetl/muno:20260513-auth0-amd64-050223
curl -H 'Host: muno.mestumre.dev' http://35.190.7.25/ returned the Muno index.html

known_notes: The first image tag was built for the Mac host architecture and crashed on GKE with `exec format error`; the build script now defaults to PLATFORM=linux/amd64 and the deployment uses the corrected amd64 tag.
The cluster needed a Kubernetes ghcr-pull imagePullSecret because anonymous GHCR pulls returned 401.
The GKE ManagedCertificate is still Provisioning, expected until DNS points muno.mestumre.dev at the Ingress and Google can validate the domain.
Live Auth0 browser smoke is intentionally deferred until DNS and certificate are ready.
verdict: AMBER_PENDING_DNS. Code, image, PRs, and GKE origin deployment are complete. Waiting on Cloudflare DNS/certificate activation before phase 8 live URL and Auth0 sign-in smoke.
